---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, enhancement, or idea for Image Label IA.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## ❓ Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I have to..."

## 💡 Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this benefits photographers or developers using this tool.

## 🔄 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 🎨 Visual Mockups (Optional)
If this is a UI/UX feature, please attach drawings, wireframes, or references to other applications.

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
